headline: The Hidden Stock Riding Energy’s Coattails to a 1,640% Gain Still Has Room to Run
summary: The U.S. energy sector keeps humming along as artificial intelligence pushes data-center power demand into overdrive, LNG exports ramp up, and utilities pour billions into grid upgrades. Electrical equipment makers have ridden this wave. Powell Industries (NASDAQ:POWL), the Houston-based supplier of custom-engineered switchgear, motor controls, and power-distribution systems, has gone along for the ride. Shares ... The Hidden Stock Riding Energy’s Coattails to a 1,640% Gain Still Has Room to Run
